app.title: Show HN: DOM-docx – HTML to native, editable Word docs (MIT)
app.author: fishbone
app.description: Convert HTML documents to editable Word documents
proposed_tests: Install dom-docx and convert a simple HTML document
Measure performance of conversion for a large document
Test compatibility with different Word versions
